name: @cf/openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo
description: Whisper is a pre-trained model for automatic speech recognition (ASR) and speech translation.

task.name: Automatic Speech Recognition
task.description: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) models convert a speech signal, typically an audio input, to text.

anyOf.description: Base64 encoded value of the audio data.

language.description: The language of the audio being transcribed or translated.

vad_filter.description: Preprocess the audio with a voice activity detection model.

initial_prompt.description: A text prompt to help provide context to the model on the contents of the audio.

prefix.description: The prefix appended to the beginning of the output of the transcription and can guide the transcription result.

beam_size.description: The number of beams to use in beam search decoding. Higher values may improve accuracy at the cost of speed.

condition_on_previous_text.description: Whether to condition on previous text during transcription. Setting to false may help prevent hallucination loops.

no_speech_threshold.description: Threshold for detecting no-speech segments. Segments with no-speech probability above this value are skipped.

compression_ratio_threshold.description: Threshold for filtering out segments with high compression ratio, which often indicate repetitive or hallucinated text.

log_prob_threshold.description: Threshold for filtering out segments with low average log probability, indicating low confidence.

hallucination_silence_threshold.description: Optional threshold (in seconds) to skip silent periods that may cause hallucinations.

language.description: The language of the audio being transcribed or translated.

language_probability.description: The confidence level or probability of the detected language being accurate, represented as a decimal between 0 and 1.

duration.description: The total duration of the original audio file, in seconds.

duration_after_vad.description: The duration of the audio after applying Voice Activity Detection (VAD) to remove silent or irrelevant sections, in seconds.

text.description: The complete transcription of the audio.

word_count.description: The total number of words in the transcription.

start.description: The starting time of the segment within the audio, in seconds.

end.description: The ending time of the segment within the audio, in seconds.

temperature.description: The temperature used in the decoding process, controlling randomness in predictions. Lower values result in more deterministic outputs.

avg_logprob.description: The average log probability of the predictions for the words in this segment, indicating overall confidence.

compression_ratio.description: The compression ratio of the input to the output, measuring how much the text was compressed during the transcription process.

no_speech_prob.description: The probability that the segment contains no speech, represented as a decimal between 0 and 1.

word.description: The individual word transcribed from the audio.

start.description: The starting time of the word within the audio, in seconds.

end.description: The ending time of the word within the audio, in seconds.

vtt.description: The transcription in WebVTT format, which includes timing and text information for use in subtitles.
